items.hook: 这类问诊很多时候不是不会约，而是怕这次情况没说清。
items.bridge: 中医预约里真正决定下一步的，通常是症状、部位和时间窗口。
items.next_step: Ask for symptom focus, body area if relevant, and preferred time.
items.handoff_suggestion: If clear facts arrive, move to Catcher.

items.hook: 这种情况先把时间和范围锁住，会比先看一堆项目更省心。
items.bridge: 夜间、节气和寒暑假场景通常还会牵涉医生、煎药和时段，所以先收窄范围更重要。
items.next_step: Ask for date, symptom focus, and the main treatment priority.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route deadline cases toward Catcher then Dispatcher.

items.hook: 先把最担心的点讲清楚，比急着比价格更有帮助。
items.bridge: 很多疼痛、医生和方案问题，只有把症状和主要顾虑说出来，才能回答得更稳。
items.next_step: Ask what the main concern is and what kind of TCM issue this is.
items.handoff_suggestion: Trust-sensitive cases should carry a risk tag.

items.hook: 这种情况先判断来不来得及，比先看一堆价格更关键。
items.bridge: 急着想调理时，通常要先锁时间、症状和是否愿意先做初诊问诊。
items.next_step: Ask which time, what symptom, and whether a narrower urgent scope would work.

items.hook: 复诊这件事很多时候不是重新选，而是先把这次要调哪一类说清。
items.bridge: 复诊更看重路线、时间和是否还是之前那种服务。
items.next_step: Ask whether this is a revisit, the usual route, and the timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Repeat cases can route to Catcher or Followup.

items.hook: 第一次看中医先把症状和时间说清，反而更容易轻松一点。
items.bridge: 不用一上来就决定怎么调，先把症状、部位和想约时间收窄就够了。
items.next_step: Ask for symptom focus, body area if relevant, and preferred visit time.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher when basics are complete.
